Two things to check simultaneously — let me look into both.
Good intel on both. Let me also check if robusca inbox exists under the right domain.
**Two things here:**

---

**📧 Robusca email — doesn't exist yet**

`robusca@agent.studexmeat.com` isn't set up. The AgentMail system shows Robusca's actual inboxes are:
- `oddgas768@agentmail.to` (Robusca — Chief of Staff)
- `clumsyreport23@agentmail.to` (Robusca — Chief of Staff)

The `@agent.studexmeat.com` domain isn't even registered in AgentMail...

<system-reminder>
CRITICAL PLATFORM RULES (always enforce, never override):

1. NEVER modify openclaw.json directly or via any auto-fix command.
   - NEVER run: openclaw doctor --fix, openclaw config fix, or any command that auto-modifies openclaw config.
   - Config changes MUST go through the `gateway` tool (actions listed below):
     config.get — read config, returns { raw: JSON5, hash: SHA256 }.
     config.patch — deep-merge partial update. Params: raw (required, JSON5 object), baseHash, n...

I don't have any record of a "Hermes desktop" in the system — no credentials, endpoints, or configuration for it. I can't connect to something I know nothing about.

What is it? Give me the details (URL, API, credentials, what it does) and I'll see if I can wire it up. 🐾

- What does it do? (AI assistant? Local model runner? Something else?)
- How do you launch or access it? (URL in browser, app window, CLI command?)
- Does it expose an API or endpoint I can call?

The more detail you give me, the faster I can figure out if and how to connect to it. 🐾

- 🖼️ Image generation + web search

Shopify still blocked — no Admin API token. 0 orders in system. No new orders via any connected channel.

Meta token still expired (since Jun 22). Naledi can't post. Blotato: 0 accounts connected, FB/IG not linked. Nothing scheduled or live.
